action.reasoning: Observation: test ran episode 0 with v17 (safe=63/streak=63/detector=112/min_d=1.12 - best so far) but crashed on reset() for later episodes with AttributeError: rom=None in rearrange_sim._clear_objects (episode-specific object loading failure). Analysis: relative config paths likely cause inconsistent sim initialization for some episodes in the 10-episode dataset; absolute paths + explicit dataset.data_path + exact quick-start overrides will fix. Policy reaches human occasionally but loses lock (avg_dist high); v18 lowers detector thresh to 0.05, refines OA (valid>0.05, left/right w//3), adds alignment-reduced speed, base 0.28m/s match, pure-rotate at 0.4rad (~23deg), aggressive seek. This should extend streaks/safe_steps. Root cause of crash is config loading; of low performance is follow-mode tuning. Decision: rewrite FULL non-truncated test_full_episode.py + predict.py (abs paths, v18 policy class, per-step manual safe count + avg_dist accum + full diagnostics/JSON contract with make_serializable + metrics fallback, output dir creation, with-Env block). Update train.py to v18. Run test_full_episode.py (5 eps) for crash-fix + score validation before submit_eval on predict.py.
